vocab.meaning: những vật dụng luôn mang theo bên mình hàng ngày
vocab.example: My everyday carry is quite minimalist, usually consisting of just my smartphone and a pair of earbuds.
I have a small leather pouch to keep all my daily necessities organized so they don't get lost in my backpack.

vocab.meaning: do bắt buộc/nhu cầu cần thiết
vocab.example: I carry a portable charger out of necessity because I rely heavily on my phone for navigation throughout the day.
I tend to avoid carrying bulky items like large umbrellas, preferring a compact raincoat that fits in my pocket.
With the rise of the digital wallet, I rarely find the need to carry a physical purse or cash anymore.

vocab.meaning: vật sở hữu quý giá (thường mang theo để dùng hoặc làm kỷ niệm)
vocab.example: My kindle is a prized possession that I always bring along to make the most of my time during long commutes.

vocab.meaning: làm đầy túi quần một cách bừa bộn
vocab.example: I hate to clutter my pockets with loose change, so I always carry a small coin purse instead.

vocab.meaning: bộ đồ dùng khẩn cấp (nhỏ gọn)
vocab.example: I always keep a tiny emergency kit with band-aids and painkillers tucked away in my bag.
Every item in my bag serves a specific utilitarian purpose; I’m not one to carry things 'just in case'.

vocab.meaning: mang đồ nhẹ nhàng, không lỉnh kỉnh
vocab.example: I always strive to travel light when running errands to ensure I can move around the city comfortably.
